name: I-Magnesium Sulfate (MgSO4)
description: I-CNS depressant kanye ne-anticonvulsant esetshenziselwa ukuvimbela kanye nokwelashwa kwe-eclamptic seizures (i-seizures ekukhulelwe kusukela ku-pre-eclampsia). Futhi isetshenziselwa isifuba somoya esinamandla kanye ne-torsades de pointes. Umugqa wokuqala we-eclampsia phezu kwe-benzodiazepines.
indications: Torsades de Pointes (polymorphic V-tach from hypomagnesemia)
dose: I-Eclampsia yokulayisha umthamo: 4-6g IV ukusunduza okunensayo ngaphezu kwemizuzu engama-20. Isondlo: 1-2g/ihora IV ukumnika. Uma ukuquleka kuphinda: 2-4g IV ngaphezu kwemizuzu emi-5. Ukulayisha kwe-IM (uma kungekho IV): 5g IM isinqe ngasinye (ingqikithi engu-10g) ngesikhathi esisodwa.
window: Qala ekuqaleni kokuquleka noma ekuxilongweni kwezimpawu ze-pre-eclampsia ezinzima.
warnings: Izimpawu zobuthi: ukulahlekelwa i-patellar reflex (uphawu lokuqala, 7-10 mEq/L), ukucindezeleka kokuphefumula (> 10 mEq/L), ukuboshwa kwenhliziyo (> 15 mEq/L).
Gada i-patellar reflexes njalo ngemizuzu engu-15 -- ukulahlekelwa i-reflex = ukuyeka ukumnika.
I-ANTIDOTE yobuthi: I-Calcium gluconate 1g IV ngaphezu kwemizuzu emi-3.
Yehlisa umthamo ekulimaleni kwezinso -- qapha ukuphuma komchamo.

pediatric.dose: Ama-Torsades: 25-50 mg/kg IV phezu kwe-10-20 min (ubukhulu obungu-2g). Isifuba somoya esibi kakhulu: 25-75 mg/kg IV (max 2g).
pediatric.note: Akuvamile ukusetshenziselwa ukuquleka ezigulini ezingezona ezokubeletha -- i-eclampsia iyinkomba eyinhloko.

obstetric.note: Inkomba eyinhloko. Iwela i-placenta - i-neonatal hypermagnesemia kungenzeka. Umthamo wezingane ezisanda kuzalwa uma ukucindezeleka kokuphefumula: i-calcium gluconate 100 mg/kg IV. Yazisa ithimba le-NICU ngokusetshenziswa kwe-magnesium yomama.

source: JTS CPG: Obstetric Emergencies / Eclampsia Management Guidelines / ACOG
